chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-256 of 2017 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No.1801/2017 2. For hearing of main case 20-09-2023 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Sawand Khan Jagirani, Advocate for SIDA Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Anwar Ali Soomro, Executive Engineer Ghotki Division.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he does not press this petition for want of instructions and incontact with the petitioner. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
